_meta.query: "Iran military" OR "IRGC" OR "Tehran strike" OR "Operation Epic Fury"
_meta.note: SAMPLE file showing what raw NewsAPI responses look like.

articles.author: Reuters Staff
articles.title: US and Israel launch strikes on Iran nuclear facilities in Operation Epic Fury
articles.description: The United States and Israel launched a major military operation against Iran targeting nuclear enrichment sites and IRGC command infrastructure.
articles.content: WASHINGTON/TEL AVIV — The United States and Israel launched coordinated airstrikes against Iran early on Saturday...

articles.author: BBC World Service
articles.title: Iran: Supreme Leader Khamenei killed in US-Israel strikes
articles.description: Iran's Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei was killed in the opening hours of a joint US-Israeli military operation targeting Iranian leadership and nuclear facilities.
articles.content: Iran's Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei has been killed following targeted strikes by US and Israeli forces...

articles.author: Al Jazeera Staff
articles.title: Tehran under attack: Explosions rock Iranian capital
articles.description: Multiple explosions reported across Tehran as US and Israeli forces conduct the most extensive military campaign against Iran in history.
articles.content: Large explosions have been reported across Tehran and other Iranian cities...

articles.author: Washington Post Staff
articles.title: AI selected 1,000 Iranian targets in 24 hours, Pentagon officials say
articles.description: Palantir's Maven Smart System, containing Anthropic's Claude AI, helped US commanders select targets at unprecedented scale during the Iran operation.
articles.content: US military artificial intelligence systems played an unprecedented role in the Iran strikes...

articles.author: AP Staff
articles.title: Iran internet goes dark as strikes begin
articles.description: Internet monitoring groups reported Iranian connectivity dropped to near-zero levels as strikes began, consistent with either physical damage to infrastructure or government shutdown.
articles.content: Iran's internet connectivity collapsed to approximately 4% of normal levels...
